ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., New York Stock Exchange) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange (e.g., New York, USA) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange (e.g., EST) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the exchange */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock (e.g., Apple Inc.) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector within the industry (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "money" REAL /* Total money traded for the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "adjusted_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "adjusted_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount for the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange observing the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday (e.g., New Year's Day) */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., National, Exchange) */,
  "is_observed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the holiday is observed (in case of date shifts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading hour */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday) */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening time of the exchange on the given day */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing time of the exchange on the given day */,
  "is_pre_market" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the hours are pre-market hours */,
  "is_post_market" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the hours are post-market hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the visualization */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range of the visualization (e.g., 2020-01-01 to 2020-12-31) */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock used to train the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (e.g., 0.8) */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last trained */,
  "training_data_range" TEXT /* Date range of the data used for training the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for training the model (e.g., learning rate, epochs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock on the given date */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_high" REAL /* Predicted highest price */,
  "predicted_low" REAL /* Predicted lowest price */,
  "predicted_volume" REAL /* Predicted trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that detected the anomaly */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., price spike, volume surge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "real_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the real-time data point */,
  "price" REAL /* Real-time price of the stock */,
  "volume" REAL /* Real-time trading volume of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the real-time data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score of the real-time data (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log (if applicable) */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module of the system where the log was generated (e.g., Data Ingestion, Visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
